zh.Chilton, Shropshire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Andrew Lutteral於1335年12月出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Sir John Luttrell48歲，母親Joan de Mohun27歲。他於1359年6月28日之後與Elizabeth Courtenay在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1395年在英國享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.Chilton, Shropshire, England, United Kin: 英国英格兰史洛普爾爾頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Andrew Lutteral于1335年12月出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲Sir John Luttrell48岁，母亲Joan de Mohun27岁。他于1359年6月28日之后与Elizabeth Courtenay在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1395年在英国享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Lutteral
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Luttrell
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): from a diminutive of Old French loutre ‘otter’ (from Latin lutra), applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble an otter, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who hunted otters (for their pelts). Compare Luter and Litteral .

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Andrew Lutteral was born in December 1335, in Devon, England, his father, Sir John Luttrell, was 48 and his mother, Joan de Mohun, was 27. He married Elizabeth Courtenay after 28 June 1359, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1395, in England, at the age of 60, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Andrew Lutteral est né en décembre 1335, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Luttrell, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Joan de Mohun, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Courtenay après 28 juin 1359, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1395, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Andrew Lutteral im Dezember 1335 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Luttrell 48 und seine Mutter Joan de Mohun 27. Er hat nach 28. Juni 1359 in Devon, England Elizabeth Courtenay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1395 im Alter von 60 Jahren in England und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Andrew Lutteral è nato il nel dicembre 1335 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, Sir John Luttrell, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Mohun, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Courtenay dopo il 28 giugno 1359, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1395, nel England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Chilton, Devon, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスデボン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew Lutteralが1335年12月にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir John Luttrellは48歳，母Joan de Mohunは27歳であった。1359年6月28日以後にイギリスデボンでElizabeth Courtenayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1395年にイギリスで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew Lutteral(이)가 1335년 12월 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Luttrell(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Mohun(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1359년 6월 28일 이후 영국 데폰에서 Elizabeth Courtenay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1395년 영국에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Andrew Lutteral nasceu em dezembro de 1335, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Luttrell, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Mohun, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Courtenay após 28 de junho de 1359, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1395, em Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Andrew Lutteral родился декабрь 1335 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Luttrell было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Mohun, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Courtenay после 28 июнь 1359 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1395 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Andrew Lutteral nació en diciembre de 1335, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Luttrell, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Joan de Mohun, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Courtenay después de 28 de junio de 1359, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1395, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
